title: Assembly election 2026 highlights: Amit Shah targets Mamata over ‘Babri Masjid-modelled’ mosque, ‘infiltrators’
description: Assembly Elections 2026 highlights: Union Home Minister Amit Shah on Tuesday accused West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee of protecting “infiltrators”, encouraging dynastic politics, and supporting efforts to build a “Babri Masjid-modelled mosque” in the state.
